name: Shredded Beet Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb seedless green grapes, stemmed and halved
1 ripe Anjou pear, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut greens from beets and reserve.
2. Peel beets; rinse and pat dry.
3. Coarsely grate beets into a medium-sized bowl.
4. To make the dressing: In a small jar with tight-fitting lid, place apple juice, oil, lime juice, mustard, salt, and pepper. Shake until well mixed.
5. Pour half of the dressing over shredded beets; toss and refrigerate for 15 minutes.
6. Rinse and dry reserved beet greens. Trim and discard stems.
7. Stack leaves and cut into 1/4-inch wide slices.
8. Arrange greens on a large serving plate to cover the plate.
9. Mound shredded beets in the center and sprinkle with grapes.
10. Arrange pear slices around the mound of beets.
11. Drizzle remaining dressing over salad.
12. Serve immediately.
